title: "Every Effort Being Made To Bring Back Stuck Indians": S Jaishankar On Iran War
summary_full: Dialogue and diplomacy are the only way out of the Middle East crisis, and the government is closely monitoring developments in the region that is home to millions of Indians, External Affairs Minister Dr S Jaishankar said in Parliament today.
